page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 208 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CL physical cores. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 208 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 14.77 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. There are no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance type.

Given its massive memory-to-CPU ratio and high physical core count, this instance represents a high-density resource profile. It is qualitatively positioned for large-scale enterprise workloads that require substantial memory footprints and dedicated CPU execution, such as in-memory databases, large-scale SAP HANA deployments, heavy data caching layers, and complex enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 208 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CL physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that eliminates hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of RAM, providing 14.77 GB of memory per core, but does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile is engineered for workloads requiring massive memory capacity and dedicated compute resources, making it suitable for large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and intensive data processing tasks.
